hero.title: Advanced Technology for Better Dental Care
hero.subtitle: We invest in the latest dental technology so your care is more precise, comfortable, and efficient

whyItMatters.title: Why Technology Matters for Your Dental Care
whyItMatters.description: Modern dental technology isn't just impressive — it directly improves your experience. Digital X-rays mean 90% less radiation. 3D CT scanning means more accurate implant placement. Same-day crowns mean one visit instead of two. Every technology we invest in is chosen because it makes your care better.
